metadata.description: Swift/iOS development skills and scripts for Claude Code

plugins.name: ferry
plugins.description: Physical iPad/iPhone workflows via the ferry CLI — deploy, device selection, lock detection, iOS 26.4-safe log capture, container file transfer

plugins.name: swift-cxx-interop
plugins.description: Swift 6 / C++ interoperability — importing C++ types into Swift, SWIFT_SHARED_REFERENCE, lifetime annotations, std::span safe interop, std::string bridging, cv::Mat patterns, and Swift-to-C++ export
